# AI Crawler Audit

> Audit how a robots.txt treats 19 documented AI crawler and control tokens, then generate a deliberate policy. Includes a live-site CLI.

## Tool

- [AI Crawler Audit](https://jaydenyoonzk.github.io/ai-crawler-audit/): the tool itself, a static page that runs entirely in the browser with no accounts and no data collection

## Documentation

- [README](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/ai-crawler-audit#readme): what the tool does, how it works, and its engineering notes
- [Changelog](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/ai-crawler-audit/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): dated release history

## Source

- [Repository](https://github.com/JaydenYoonZK/ai-crawler-audit): MIT licensed source code
